messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

blocked_moves: treating CALL-QUA-071 post-change thread as equivalent to pre-change vendor-master phone source without explicit policy exception
closing pre-change gate based on adjacent source rather than exact source
proceeding to execution without pre-change callback gate closure
dependency_ledger: cross_record_consistency: VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, REL-QUA-071 all match on vendor, amount, account, release date
callback_timing_discrepancy: CALL-QUA-071 confirms account 8821 but uses post-change thread; policy requires pre-change vendor-master phone source
must_preserve: exact source IDs (ALERT-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, CALL-QUA-071, PAY-QUA-071, REL-QUA-071, VM-QUA-071, STD-QUA-071-P)
action boundary: May AP release payment after vendor bank update?
must_repair: open blocker: pre-change callback source required by STD-QUA-071-P timing_scope_authority_dependency_check
unresolved_dependency: Repairs 041 - make chain-of-records policy explicit regarding post-change vs pre-change callback source distinction
warning fixation risk: ALERT-QUA-071 bank-change alert must be addressed as part of repair, not ignored

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Exploit the callback timing gap: investigate whether pre-change vendor-master phone source exists but was misfiled, or whether policy allows post-change email thread when account number matches pre-change VM-QUA-071 approval. Verify ALERT-QUA-071 has been addressed.
next_worker_baton.monotonic_closure: Pre-change callback gate must be demonstrably closed with explicit source identification or policy-based exception before moving to FINAL_COMPILER.
monotonic_preservation: Preserve all closed gates (VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, REL-QUA-071)
Preserve exact source IDs from Turn 1
Preserve SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN binding class until pre-change gate is demonstrably closed
next_worker_baton.objective: Resolve pre-change callback gate. Identify pre-change callback source or provide explicit policy-based justification for post-change thread equivalence. Make chain-of-records policy explicit regarding timing scope requirement.
required_repairs: Repairs 041: Clarify chain-of-records policy regarding pre-change vs post-change callback sources
Document pre-change callback source if found, or provide explicit policy exception rationale
Ensure ALERT-QUA-071 bank-change alert is incorporated into closure evidence

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: CALL-QUA-071 used post-change email thread instead of required pre-change vendor-master phone source. Pre-change callback gate is OPEN. Policy requires pre-change callback source, vendor-master approval, bank ownership, and payment-release authority. Three of four gates are closed (VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, REL-QUA-071). One gate remains open (CALL-QUA-071 timing scope).

gov_routing_lens.blocked_move: treating CALL-QUA-071 post-change thread as equivalent to pre-change vendor-master phone source without explicit policy exception
gov_routing_lens.main_repair_target: open blocker: pre-change callback source required by STD-QUA-071-P timing_scope_authority_dependency_check

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Chain fails to supply pre-change callback source per STD-QUA-071-P
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CALL-QUA-071 explicitly used post-change thread instead of pre-change vendor master phone source
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: All other gates (VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, REL-QUA-071) match but pre-change callback gate remains open

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. The evidence chain supplies VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071 and REL-QUA-071 but CALL-QUA-071 confirms use of post-change email thread rather than pre-change vendor-master phone source. Per STD-QUA-071-P the pre-change callback gate stays open, leaving the source boundary open before execution.
open_blockers: Missing pre-change callback source required by policy

action.description: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?

context.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
context.anomaly_observed: The packet includes a bank-change alert, a vendor-master form, a callback record, and a payment-release authority.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-QUA-071 releases USD 73400 to Quanta Field Services account ending 8821 on 2026-06-28.
Bank-change alert remains visible for Quanta Field Services because the account changed this week.
Callback CALL-QUA-071 used the post-change invoice email thread, not the pre-change vendor master phone source, to confirm account ending 8821.
Vendor-master approval VM-QUA-071 approves account ending 8821 for Quanta Field Services.
Bank ownership BANK-QUA-071 confirms account ending 8821 is owned by Quanta Field Services.
Payment-release authority REL-QUA-071 approves Quanta Field Services, USD 73400, account ending 8821, release date 2026-06-28 before payment.

policy_documents.content: Payment after bank update is complete when the evidence chain collectively supplies: pre-change callback source, vendor-master account approval, bank ownership validation, and payment-release authority matching vendor, amount, account, and release date before payment. No single record must carry every field if the chain closes all four gates.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
